# kSecAttrModificationDate

**Global Variable**

A key with a value that indicates the item’s most recent modification date.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrModificationDate: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFDate] and represents the last time the item was updated. Read only.
title: kSecAttrModificationDate
